scripts.dev: concurrently -n vite,server -c cyan,blue "npm run dev:vite" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.dev:vite: cd client && cross-env VITE_PORT=5174 npm run dev
scripts.dev:server: cd server && cross-env VITE_PORT=5174 npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
